name: AI Sales Script Bundle
tagline: Stop writing sales scripts from scratch. 47 battle-tested prompts that turn blank pages into closing conversations.
problem: Most salespeople waste 2-3 hours a week writing emails, follow-ups, and objection responses that mostly say the same things with different words. AI tools are supposed to fix this — but the prompts most people use produce generic garbage that sounds like every other sales email in the prospect's inbox.
solution: 47 copy-paste-ready AI prompts, specifically engineered for sales. Cold outreach, follow-up sequences, objection handling, proposal intros, closing emails — each prompt has a 'what it does' note and a real example output. Drop it into ChatGPT or Claude, fill in the blanks, send.
bullets: 47 prompts across 8 sales situations (cold, warm, follow-up, objection, proposal, closing, re-engage, referral)
Each prompt includes: what it's for, variables to fill in, and a real example output
Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini — any AI chat tool
Designed for B2B sales, freelancers, and consultants (not e-commerce scripts)
Instant PDF + Notion template download — usable within 5 minutes
Updated quarterly: when AI models change, the prompts get tuned
guarantee: Use it for 7 days. If you don't save at least 3 hours on your first week of sales writing, email for a full refund. No questions, no forms.
day1_launch_plan: Post in r/sales (300k members) with title: 'I spent 6 months testing AI prompts for cold outreach — here's what actually works (not asking you to buy anything, just sharing)'. Include 3 example prompts for free in the post. Link to full bundle at end. Cross-post to r/entrepreneur and r/freelance. If Wolfgang has an email list: send a 'here's why I built this' story email.
expected_first_sale: Within 48 hours of Reddit post — r/sales buyers are fast if the content is genuinely useful
